mapper.select:
SELECT TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID, TPPSD.STOREHOUSE_ID, TPPSD.REGION_ID, TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TPPSD.STOREHOUSE_NAME, TPPSD.REGION_NAME, TPPSD.MASS_NAME, TPPSD.TON FROM (SELECT CARGO_INFO_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, REGION_ID, MASS_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_NAME, MASS_NAME, SUM(TON) TON FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0'
or CARGO_INFO_ID IN (select TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID from T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR left join T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL TBCMD on TBCMR.id = TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID where TBCMR.ID = #{mixRecordId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
GROUP BY CARGO_INFO_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, REGION_ID, MASS_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_NAME, MASS_NAME) TPPSD JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID WHERE (TBCI.IS_CLEAR = '0' and (TBCI.IS_LOGOUT != 10 or TBCI.IS_LOGOUT is null)
or TBCI.ID IN (select TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID from T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR left join T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL TBCMD on TBCMR.id = TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID where TBCMR.ID = #{mixRecordId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
) AND TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = #{cargoOwnerId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TPPSD.STOREHOUSE_NAME, TPPSD.REGION_NAME, TPPSD.MASS_NAME

SELECT TBCI.ID "cargoInfoId", TBC.ID "contractId", TBC.CONTACT_NO "contractNo", TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS "freeStorageDays" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON (TBCR.TYPE = '10' AND TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240' AND TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = TBCR.CARGO_CODE) WHERE TBC.STATUS = '20' AND
( #{item.firstInDate,jdbcType=DATE} >= TBC.START_TIME AND #{item.firstInDate,jdbcType=DATE} <= TBC.END_TIME AND TBCI.ID = #{item.cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD(ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_CODE, STOREHOUSE_ID, REGION_ID, MASS_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, MIX_WEIGHT, MIX_TIME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID,SHIPVOYAGE_ID,SHIP_NAME,VOYAGE,IS_BILLING) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{massId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{mixWeight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{mixTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{shipvoyageItemId},#{shipvoyageId},#{shipName},#{voyage},#{isBilling})

INSERT ALL
INTO T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL(ID, MIX_RECORD_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, REGION_ID, MASS_ID, MIX_WEIGHT, CONTRACT_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, REMAIN_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES (#{detail.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.mixRecordId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.storehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.regionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.massId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.mixWeight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.freeStorageDays, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{detail.remainFreeStorageDays, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{detail.loginUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{detail.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail.updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select:
SELECT TBCMR.ID, TBCMR.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCMR.CARGO_CODE, TBCMR.STOREHOUSE_ID, TBCMR.REGION_ID, TBCMR.MASS_ID, TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID, TBCMR.MIX_WEIGHT, TBCMR.MIX_TIME, TBCMR.STATUS, TBCMR.CREATE_BY, TBCMR.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCMR.CREATE_TIME, TBCMR.UPDATE_BY, TBCMR.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCMR.UPDATE_TIME, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, MSY.STOREHOUSE_NAME, MSY.REGION_NAME, MSY.MASS_NAME, CASE WHEN TBCMR.STATUS = '10' THEN '未审核' ELSE (CASE WHEN TBCMR.STATUS = '20' THEN '已审核' END) END STATUS_LABEL FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID JOIN (SELECT L1.ID STOREHOUSE_ID, L1.STORAGE_YARD_NM STOREHOUSE_NAME, L2.ID REGION_ID, L2.STORAGE_YARD_NM REGION_NAME, L3.ID MASS_ID, L3.STORAGE_YARD_NM MASS_NAME FROM M_STORAGE_YARD L1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD L2 ON L2.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' AND L1.ID = L2.PARENT_ID LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD L3 ON L3.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND L2.ID = L3.PARENT_ID WHERE L1.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1') MSY ON (TBCMR.STOREHOUSE_ID = MSY.STOREHOUSE_ID AND TBCMR.REGION_ID = MSY.REGION_ID AND TBCMR.MASS_ID = MSY.MASS_ID)
AND ( TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO LIKE #{cargoInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL TBCMD JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID WHERE TBCMR.ID = TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO = #{cargoInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) > 0 ) )
ORDER BY TBCMR.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT TBCMR.ID TBCMR_ID, TBCMR.CARGO_OWNER_ID TBCMR_CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCMR.CARGO_CODE TBCMR_CARGO_CODE, TBCMR.STOREHOUSE_ID TBCMR_STOREHOUSE_ID, TBCMR.REGION_ID TBCMR_REGION_ID, TBCMR.MASS_ID TBCMR_MASS_ID, TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID TBCMR_CARGO_INFO_ID, TBCMR.MIX_WEIGHT TBCMR_MIX_WEIGHT, TBCMR.MIX_TIME TBCMR_MIX_TIME, TBCMR.STATUS TBCMR_STATUS, TBCMR.CREATE_BY TBCMR_CREATE_BY, TBCMR.CREATE_BY_NAME TBCMR_CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCMR.CREATE_TIME TBCMR_CREATE_TIME, TBCMR.UPDATE_BY TBCMR_UPDATE_BY, TBCMR.UPDATE_BY_NAME TBCMR_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCMR.UPDATE_TIME TBCMR_UPDATE_TIME, TBCMR.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCMR.SHIPVOYAGE_ID SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBCMR.SHIP_NAME SHIP_NAME, TBCMR.VOYAGE VOYAGE, TBCMR.IS_BILLING IS_BILLING, TBCMD.ID TBCMD_ID, TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID TBCMD_MIX_RECORD_ID, TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID TBCMD_CARGO_INFO_ID, TBCMD.STOREHOUSE_ID TBCMD_STOREHOUSE_ID, TBCMD.REGION_ID TBCMD_REGION_ID, TBCMD.MASS_ID TBCMD_MASS_ID, TBCMD.MIX_WEIGHT TBCMD_MIX_WEIGHT, TBCMD.CONTRACT_ID TBCMD_CONTRACT_ID, TBCMD.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS TBCMD_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBCMD.REMAIN_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS TBCMD_REMAIN_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBCMD.CREATE_BY TBCMD_CREATE_BY, TBCMD.CREATE_BY_NAME TBCMD_CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCMD.CREATE_TIME TBCMD_CREATE_TIME, TBCMD.UPDATE_BY TBCMD_UPDATE_BY, TBCMD.UPDATE_BY_NAME TBCMD_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCMD.UPDATE_TIME TBCMD_UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL TBCMD ON TBCMR.ID = TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID WHERE TBCMR.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, YSPHH, JSZT, TOS_CARGO_ID, CDH, IS_TOS FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ID IN
#{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBCI.ID "cargoInfoId", CASE WHEN (TBCI.IS_TOS = '卸船' OR TBT.TYPE = '卸船') THEN TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') WHEN (TBCI.IS_TOS = '集港' OR TBT.TYPE = '集港') THEN JG.FIRST_IN_DATE WHEN TBCI.ROOT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE WHEN TBCI.SOURCE = '50' THEN TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TBCMR.MIX_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') END "firstInDate" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBCI.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT), 'yyyy-mm-dd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') FIRST_IN_DATE FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) JG ON TBCI.ID = JG.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR ON TBCI.ID = TBCMR.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBCI.ID IN
#{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT CARGO_NAME FROM M_CARGO WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_CARGO_INFO(ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, YSPHH, JSZT, TOS_CARGO_ID, CDH, IS_TOS, MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoAgentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rootId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{rightsQuantity, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{surplusRightsQuantity, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{isClear, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clearBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clearByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clearDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{source, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractItemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{residueStorage, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transferDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ysphh, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jszt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tosCargoId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cdh, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isTos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mixFreeStorageDays, jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, CONTRACT_ID, RATE, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, AMOUNT, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_BY_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, YSPHH, JSZT, TOS_CARGO_ID, CDH, IS_TOS FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, DIRECTION, QUANTITY, TON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, BHT_ID, WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, RATE, EST_AMOUNT, CONTRACT_NAME, BUSINESS_NO, HATCHS, PRINT_POUND_ID, PRINT_POUND_NUM, IS_SECOND_WEIGH, STATUS, INNERTRANSPORT_TYPE, BANG_CUSTOMER, RATE_LABEL, CONSIGNER_ID, CONSIGNER_NAME, TRANSPORT_TYPE, EMPTY_WEIGHT, HEAVY_WEIGHT, IS_RULE, IS_TOS, PHH, CDH, IS_CEREAL FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, MIX_RECORD_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, REGION_ID, MASS_ID, MIX_WEIGHT, CONTRACT_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, REMAIN_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO t LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON t.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID where t.ID = #{cargoInfoId}
select TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(MIN(WEIGH_IN_DT), 'yyyy-mm-dd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') from V_WEIGHT_INFO where PLAN_TYPE = '集港' and CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId} GROUP BY CARGO_INFO_ID
select TDS.ID SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDS.SHIP_NAME, TDSI.ID, TDSI.VOYAGE from T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI left join T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS on TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID where TDSI.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBR.id, TBR.rate, TBR.process_code, TBR.tax_rate/100 tax_rate, TBR.rate_item_code, TBR.rate_item_name, MDD.DICT_VALUE "measurementUnitCode1", MDD.DICT_LABEL "measurementUnitName1" from T_BUS_RATE TBR left join M_DICT_DATA MDD on (MDD.DICT_TYPE = 'UNIT' and mdd.DICT_VALUE = TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1 ) where TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = '02' and TBR.PROCESS_CODE = #{processCd}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_MISC_BILLING ( ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, BILL_DATE, VOYAGE_ID, SHIP_VOYAGE, BILL_QUANTITY, AMOUNT_MONEY, TAX_AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME,
CUSTOMER_ID, STATUS,
COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, RATE_ID,
UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, IS_CARGO_MIX ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{rateItemCode}, #{rateName}, #{rate}, #{taxRate}, #{billDate}, #{voyageId}, #{shipVoyage}, #{billQuantity}, #{amountMoney}, #{taxAmount}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now},
#{customerId}, #{status},
#{companyId}, #{companyName}, #{rateId},
#{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{processCode}, #{processName}, #{cargoInfoId}, #{isCargoMix} )
mapper.select: select * from t_misc_billing where process_code = #{processCd} and cargo_info_id = #{id} and is_cargo_mix = '1'
mapper.delete: delete from t_misc_billing where is_cargo_mix = '1' and id = #{id} and cargo_info_id = #{cargoInfoId}
